no-restricted-globals.name: alert
no-restricted-globals.message: USCP V2 §7.2.1: window.alert 금지. components/ui/Toast 의 useToast().info|success|error|warning 으로 대체.

no-restricted-globals.name: confirm
no-restricted-globals.message: USCP V2 §7.2.1: window.confirm 금지. components/ui/ConfirmModal 로 대체.

no-restricted-globals.name: prompt
no-restricted-globals.message: USCP V2 §7.2.1: window.prompt 금지. 별도 form/Modal 로 대체.

no-restricted-syntax.message: USCP V2 §7.2.1: window.alert/confirm/prompt 금지. Modal/ConfirmModal/Toast 사용.
